title: Red Dead Weaponry
description: A Content pack which add guns form Red Dead Redemption 2 for Vic's Point Blank mod
body:
# What is this?
This is a content pack for Vic's Point Blank gun mod which add guns from Red Dead Redemption 2
## The Weapons
this is the list of guns have added to the pack

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Revolvers:**

- Cattleman Revolver
- Schofield Revolver
- Double Action Revolver
- LeMat Revolver
- Navy Revolver

**Repeaters:**

- Lancaster Repeater
- Evans Repeater
- Litchfield Repeater
- Carbine Repeater

**Rifles:**

- Rolling Block Rifle (Sniper)
- Carcano Rifle (Sniper)
- Bolt Action Rifle
- Springfield Rifle
- Elephant Rifle

**Pistols:**

- Mauser Pistol
- M1899 Pistol
- Volcanic Pistol
- Semi-Automatic Pistol

**Shotguns:**

- Double-Barrel Shotgun
- Sawed-off Shotgun
- Semi-Auto Shotgun
- Repeating Shotgun
- Pump-Action Shotgun

AND MANY MORES TO COME! (still in development though, stay tuned!)

</details>

## Requirements
[Vic's Point Blank](https://modrinth.com/mod/vics-point-blank)

[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

## Installation


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- In the same folder as 'mods' folder, Create a folder named "pointblank" (without quote)
![ini poto](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de98d391404f297882f97bcfbf77ce595aeb92fb.jpeg)
  
  should be look like this in your minecraft directory

- Put RedDeadWeaponry.zip file into pointblank folder

- Simply launch the game and enjoy!!

</details>

## Credits

- Vic's Point Blank gun mod for his awesome works and allowing us to create our own gun pack

- Rockstar Games for guns and sfx
